assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for BFCM period and explicitly mentions the 30-day maximum limitation

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for the June code freeze period

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Response uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support for permanent minor version control, which is appropriate

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions and explains that the persistent exclusion has no time limit and automatically tracks End of Support

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands with specific --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for all three exclusion types

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Response mentions maximum 3 exclusions per cluster but does not mention the 48h maintenance requirement in any 32-day window

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Manual upgrades bypass exclusions - When you run upgrade commands manually, they ignore all maintenance controls'

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response mentions EoS enforcement and states 'Even with exclusions, GKE will force-upgrade at End of Support', addressing the risk of falling behind on versions
